message:
fix(ext/vfs): extension and VFS refinements from concurrent agent work

Minor follow-up improvements from other agents working on the codebase:

- fsqlite-ext-json: fix type coercion edge case (3 lines)
- fsqlite-ext-rtree: add missing constraint check (1 line)
- fsqlite-ext-session: refine conflict resolution callback handling (5 lines)
- fsqlite-vfs/memory: expand in-memory VFS with additional I/O methods (+42 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
